query: SELECT id, orderNumber, customerName, deliveryType, deliveryFee, subtotal, total, status, createdAt FROM orders WHERE establishmentId = 60018 AND (orderNumber = 'P15' OR orderNumber LIKE '%15%') ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
